positive: A whimsical, detailed watercolor painting of a sleeping fox nestled amongst glowing bioluminescent mushrooms and delicate ferns. The style should evoke Studio Ghibli meets cottagecore, with soft pastel colors and magical lighting. Focus on intricate textures and depth of field.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, grayscale, oversaturated
